# Time Off and Leave Policy (Fixture)

## Overview

**2026** PTO excerpt for tests (mirrors `data/hr` layout). Full-time employees at Acme Payments.

---

## Paid Time Off (PTO)

### Accrual

- **18 days** PTO per year, accrued monthly from start date

### Usage

Vacation, personal matters, short-term illness. New hires: after **90 days**.

---

## Sick Leave

At least **5 days** paid sick leave per year per applicable law.

---

## Carryover

Up to **5** unused PTO days carry over.

---

Last updated: 2026 (fixture)
